---
title: "Group of Computational Immunology"
image: "img/logo_receptor.png"
listing:
  - id: projects
    contents: projects/projects
    type: default
    max-items: 3
    sort: 
      - "date desc"
      - "title asc"
  - id: team_starting
    contents: team/members
    type: grid
    max-items: 3
    grid-columns: 3
    image-height: "true"
    fields: [image, title]
    sort: 
      - "date desc"
      - "title asc"
about:
  template: trestles
  links:
    - text: K_Imkeller
      icon: twitter
      url: "https://twitter.com/K_Imkeller"
    - text: AGImkeller
      icon: github
      url: "https://github.com/AGImkeller"
    - text: ag.imkeller | gmail.com
      icon: envelope-fill
    - text: Frankfurt am Main
      icon: geo-alt-fill
      url: "https://maps.app.goo.gl/CMsLp4TGBAtipw5p9"
comments: false
---

::: column-page
:::

# About

The group of Computational Immunology applies mathematical and computational methods to multi-dimensional immunological and molecular data and thereby seeks to understand inter- and intra-individual heterogeneity of tumor-immune interactions in humans. Our aim is to develop a quantitative and patient-specific understanding of tumor-immune interactions on a cellular and antigen-specific level with the ultimate goal to improve patient care. 

Located at the University Clinic Frankfurt am Main, we closely collaborate with experimentalists and clinicians interested in tumor immunology and immunotherapy. Our work is taking place at Edinger Institute (Neurology Institute) and is closely connected to research in various brain cancers.

Please feel free to [contact us](mailto:ag.imkeller@gmail.com) if you're interested in collaborations or thesis projects (BSc/MSc).


```{=html}
<div  style="margin: 30px; text-align: center;">
<a class="button-52" href="openpositions/index.qmd" role="button" target="_blank" style="link-color: black; link-hover-decoration: none; color: black;">We're hiring!</a>
</div>

```

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6 .animate__animated .animate__fadeIn .animate__faster .animate__delay-1s}
## News
Dec 1, 2023 --- **Jens Mayer** is our new MSc Intern\
Nov 1, 2023 --- **Jonas Schuck** is our new PhD Student\
\

:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6 .animate__animated .animate__fadeIn .animate__faster .animate__delay-1s}
## Projects

Click [here](projects/index.qmd) to learn more about our latest research projects.

::: {#projects}
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6 .animate__animated .animate__fadeIn .animate__faster .animate__delay-1s}
## New Team Members

Click [here](team/index.qmd) to see our whole team.

::: {#team_starting}
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6 .animate__animated .animate__fadeIn .animate__faster .animate__delay-1s}
## Fundings and Affiliations
 
<div class="bodyimgstyle">
  <a href="https://www.krebshilfe.de/"><img src="img/1200px-Deutsche_Krebshilfe_Logo.svg.png" alt="Avatar" style="width:40%; margin:10px;"></a>
  <a href="https://www.kgu.de/"><img src="img/1280px-Logo-Goethe-University-Frankfurt-am-Main.svg.png" alt="Avatar" style="width:30%; margin:10px;"></a>
  <a href="https://www.uct-frankfurt.de/"><img src="img/csm_LOGO_UCT_4c_fin_fb46359da9.png" alt="Avatar" style="width:40%; margin:10px;"></a>
  <a href="https://fci.health/en/"><img src="img/FCI-Logo.png" alt="Avatar" style="width:30%; margin:10px;"></a>
</div>
:::
